title: second post
content: Okay so now all these blog pages are loaded dynamically with js. This is the first js I have used on this website. Its nice now because I can just use a json file and not have to worry about creating a html file for every post. There are still a few things that need to be tweaked but its working for the most part. Im pretty happy with how this turned out. Maybe in the future I will add images and inline code stuff. </br></br> Thanks for reading I guess

title: first/test post
content: I have no idea what I'm doing with my life or here on this website. I'm not really sure how to manage a website but I guess I learn as I go. I was hoping to use php or next.js to make this process easier but I think Github only allows static websites. So for now I'll just stick to the basics, but in the future I want to load content with js rather than making an html page every time I need to display something. I just need a place to show off my work and develop website making skills. Is this a good test/first post? I really don't know. </br></br> Thanks for reading I guess
